info.title: Cula
info.description:
Public Cula API. No authentication required.

Cula tracks biochar-based carbon removal credits. Biochar is produced by heating biomass (e.g. wood chips) in a low-oxygen process called pyrolysis. When biochar is applied into a stable medium (e.g. soil, concrete), the carbon it contains is locked away for centuries, creating a measurable carbon sink.

This API provides read-only access to:
- **Sinks** — verified carbon removal events, each with a full event graph
  tracing the supply chain from biomass creation through delivery, pyrolysis,
  and final application.

- **Proof documents** — photos, PDFs, and other evidence files attached to
  events in a sink's lifecycle, downloadable via their cloud storage IDs.

- **Machine data** — time-series sensor readings from pyrolysis machines
  (temperatures, gas flows, energy consumption, etc.).


**Rate limiting:** All endpoints are rate-limited to **60 requests per minute** per IP address. Exceeding this limit returns HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests).

Typical workflow: list sinks → get a sink's details (including its carbonCaptureSiteId) → list machines for that site → list data points for a machine → fetch time-series data. To download proof documents, find FileReference objects within event proofs and use their cloudStorageId with the /documents/{id} endpoint.

get.description: Returns the IDs of all carbon sinks.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

get.description: Returns the full registry sink object including event graph, sites, organisations, materials, containers, and LCA data.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

get.description: Downloads a file by its cloud storage ID. Use the cloudStorageId, blurredCloudStorageId, or thumbnailCloudStorageId from a FileReference object. Returns the raw binary stream.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A cloud storage ID (cloudStorageId, blurredCloudStorageId, or thumbnailCloudStorageId) from a FileReference.

200.description: The file contents as a binary stream.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

get.summary: List machine IDs for a site
get.description: Returns the IDs of all machines belonging to a given site. Use the carbonCaptureSiteId from a Sink — only carbon capture sites (e.g. pyrolysis sites) have machines.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

get.summary: List data point config IDs for a machine
get.description: Returns the IDs of all raw machine data point configurations for a given machine.

200.description: A list of data point config UUIDs.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

get.description: Returns metadata for a single machine data point configuration, including its name, unit, and sampling frequency.

parameters.name: machineDpConfigId
parameters.description: The UUID of the machine data point configuration.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

post.description: Fetches time-series data for one or more machine data points within specified time ranges and bucket sizes.

200.description: Time-series data for each requested data point.

404.description: One or more data point sources not found.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute per IP).

Sink.description: A carbon sink with its full registry context, including the event graph tracing its full lifecycle from biomass creation through pyrolysis to final application.

created.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z) as a string.

normalisedGrossImpact.description: Gross carbon impact in kg CO₂e sequestered, before subtracting process emissions.

normalisedNetImpact.description: Net carbon impact in kg CO₂e sequestered, after subtracting process emissions from the event graph.

validationState.description: Only sinks with validation state "complete" are returned.

isPublic.description: Whether this sink is publicly visible on the registry.

sinkSubmissionsIds.description: IDs of submissions of this sink to external registries.

ownerOrganisationId.description: ID of the organisation that owns the sink.

carbonCaptureSiteId.description: The site that captures the carbon (e.g. pyrolysis site).

materialId.description: ID of the sunken biochar material. This material is also included in the materials array, which contains all materials involved in the sink's supply chain.

confirmationDocumentFileReferenceId.description: File reference ID for the confirmation document. Find the matching FileReference in event proofs and use its cloudStorageId with the /documents/{id} endpoint to download.

eventGraph.description: Directed graph of all events in this sink's lifecycle.

sites.description: All sites involved in the sink's supply chain.

organisations.description: All organisations involved in the sink's supply chain.

materials.description: All materials referenced by the sink.

utilizedContainers.description: All material containers utilized in this sink.

lcaDatabases.description: LCA databases referenced by emission calculations.

lcaActivities.description: LCA activities (emission factors) used in emission calculations.

EventGraph.description:
Directed graph of events that make up the sink's lifecycle. The graph traces the full supply chain from biomass creation, through deliveries, pyrolysis, processing, and final application as a carbon sink.
The root node is the final event (sink creation / material application). Each node's "links" array points backward to its predecessor events. To reconstruct the chronological supply chain, traverse from leaf nodes (biomass creation) toward the root (sink creation). A typical chain looks like: biomass_creation → biomass_delivery → pyrolysis → biochar_delivery_to_sink → sink_creation. Processing and additional delivery steps may appear between stages.

root.description: Event ID of the root node (the sink creation event — the final step in the lifecycle).

nodes.description: Map of event ID to event info node.

EventInfo.description: A graph node combining graph metadata with the full registry event payload.

contributionFactor.description: Share of total impact attributed to this event for the sink (0 to 1).

isCompleted.description: Whether all required data for this event has been recorded.

eventType.description: The type of event — either a processing step or a delivery between sites.

links.description: Back-links to predecessor events in the graph.

event.description: The full event payload for this graph node.

AggregatedSinkEventLink.description: A link from one event to a predecessor event, representing material flow.

eventRef.description: Event ID of the predecessor event.

percentage.description: Fraction (0 to 1) of the predecessor that contributed to this event.

connectingContainerIds.description: Container IDs linking the two events.

connectionType.description: "direct" means both events used the same physical container; "pool" means material was drawn from a shared pool.

Event.description: A registry event in the sink lifecycle. Discriminated by "type" and "eventType". Delivery events have sender/receiver sites and payload. Step execution events have a location and input/output containers.

type.description: The category of this event in the carbon sink lifecycle. Typical chronological order: biomass_creation → biomass_processing → biomass_delivery → pyrolysis → biochar_delivery_to_processing → biochar_processing → biochar_delivery_to_sink → sink_creation. Not all steps are present in every sink.

eventType.description: Whether this is a processing step or a delivery between sites.

lcaActivities.description: LCA activities referenced by this event's emission calculations.

emissions.description: Tree-structured emission calculation for this event.

proofs.description: Evidence (photos, documents, tracking events) attached to this event.

created.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z) as a string.

wayPoints.description: Array of [longitude, latitude] coordinate pairs (route for deliveries).

senderSiteId.description: Present on delivery events. Site that sent the material.

receiverSiteId.description: Present on delivery events. Site that received the material.

payload.description: Present on delivery events. The containers being transported.

transportationDistanceInKm.description: Present on delivery events. Distance in kilometers.

location.description: Present on step execution events. The location where the step was performed (falls back to the site's location).

siteId.description: Present on step execution events. The site where the step was executed.

input.description: Present on pyrolysis, biomass_processing, biochar_processing, and sink_creation events. The input material containers.

output.description: Present on biomass_creation, biomass_processing, biochar_processing, and pyrolysis events. The output material containers.

EmissionCalculation.description: A tree-structured emission calculation. The root is always a COMPOSITE node that aggregates child nodes (which can be STATIC values, VARIABLE values, or nested COMPOSITE nodes). The "value" field holds the computed result in kg CO₂e.

id.description: Unique identifier of this calculation node.

type.description: Always "COMPOSITE" for the root calculation node.

value.description: Calculated emission value in kg CO₂e.

config.description: Configuration describing how this node's value is computed.

EmissionCalculationNode.description: A node in the emission calculation tree. Can be COMPOSITE (with nested nodes), STATIC (fixed value, optionally referencing an LCA activity), or VARIABLE (derived from a data point or event property).

id.description: Unique identifier of this calculation node.

type.description: The node type determining how its value is derived.

value.description: Calculated emission value for this node.

config.description: Configuration for this node, varies by type.

name.description: Human-readable name of this calculation step.

type.description: Config type matching the node type.

unit.description: Metric unit for this node's value (e.g. "kg CO₂e", "km").

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of this emission factor.

expression.description: Present on COMPOSITE nodes. A math expression where child node config IDs are used as variable names (e.g. "(configId1) * (configId2)").

nodeConfigs.description: Present on COMPOSITE nodes. Configs for child nodes.

value.description: Present on STATIC nodes. The fixed emission factor value.

lcaActivityId.description: Present on STATIC nodes. References an LCA activity providing the emission factor.

fileReference.description: Present on STATIC nodes. A file providing evidence for the emission factor.

linkReference.description: Present on STATIC nodes. An external link reference for the emission factor source.

sourceConfig.description: Present on VARIABLE nodes. Defines where the variable value comes from.

valueSourceType.description: "data_point" means the value comes from a machine data point; "event_key" means it comes from an event property; "manual" is used when the value was entered manually (may be omitted from older spec revisions).

nodes.description: Present on COMPOSITE nodes. Child calculation nodes.

EmissionCalculationConfig.description: Configuration for a COMPOSITE emission calculation node.

name.description: Human-readable name of this calculation step.

unit.description: Metric unit for this node's value.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of this calculation step.

expression.description: A math expression where child node config IDs are used as variable names (e.g. "(configId1) * (configId2)").

nodeConfigs.description: Configurations for child nodes in this composite calculation.

EventProof.description: Evidence attached to an event. Discriminated by "type": "file" proofs link to uploaded documents (photos, PDFs); "tracking_event" proofs are automated location/IP detections.

proofConfigs.description: Configurations describing what aspects of the event this proof covers.

isSensitive.description: Present on file proofs. If true, fileReference is redacted (no fileName or cloudStorageId).

fileReference.description: Present on file proofs. The referenced file (photo, PDF, etc.).

thumbnailFileReference.description: Present on file proofs. A thumbnail version of the file.

metaData.description: Present on tracking_event proofs. Additional metadata.

ProofConfig.description: Configuration describing what aspect of an event this proof covers.

id.description: Unique identifier of this proof config.

objectType.description: The type of provable object this proof is attached to.

key.description: The specific field or aspect of the object that this proof covers.

FileReference.description: Reference to an uploaded file in cloud storage. For sensitive file proofs, fileName and cloudStorageId are omitted.

id.description: Unique identifier of the file reference.

fileName.description: Name of the file. Omitted for sensitive file proofs.

cloudStorageId.description: ID of the file in cloud storage. Use with the /documents/{id} endpoint to download. Omitted for sensitive file proofs.

blurredCloudStorageId.description: ID of a blurred version of the file in cloud storage. Use with the /documents/{id} endpoint to download.

thumbnailCloudStorageId.description: ID of a thumbnail version of the file in cloud storage. Use with the /documents/{id} endpoint to download.

registeredSiteId.description: ID of the owning registered site.

fileSourceId.description: ID of the file source associated with this file reference.

Site.description: A site involved in the sink's supply chain.

organisationRef.description: The owning organisation's ID (if the site is registered).

OrganisationSummary.description: Summary of an organisation involved in the sink.

logoSVG.description: SVG markup of the organisation's logo.

Material.description: A material tracked in the carbon sink lifecycle (e.g. biochar, biomass).

sitesIds.description: IDs of sites associated with this material.

colors.description: Display colors for visualizing this material.

impact.description: Carbon impact information for the material.

description.description: Human-readable description of the impact calculation.

certificationId.description: ID of the material's certification (e.g. EBC certificate).

batchId.description: Batch identifier from the certification body.

batchLink.description: URL linking to the batch on the certification body's website.

applicationClass.description: Biochar quality/application class per the certification standard.

hToCRatio.description: Hydrogen-to-carbon molar ratio of the biochar.

MaterialContainer.description: A material container with its content fully resolved with material details.

created.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z) as a string.

content.description: The material amounts inside this container.

MaterialAmount.description: A specific amount of a material inside a container.

weightInKg.description: Weight of this material amount in kilograms.

material.description: The material (same shape as Material but without sitesIds and certificationId).

colors.description: Display colors for visualizing this material.

impact.description: Carbon impact information for the material.

description.description: Human-readable description of the impact calculation.

metaData.description: Certification-specific metadata (EBC or WBC biochar). Same shape as Material.metaData.

SinkMatrix.description: The sink matrix defines the application medium for the biochar (e.g. soil, concrete, compost) and its long-term carbon retention properties. Present only on sink_creation events.

id.description: Unique identifier of the sink matrix.

name.description: Display name of the matrix type (e.g. "Agricultural Soil", "Concrete").

description.description: Detailed description of this matrix type.

normalizedRemainingCarbon.description: Fraction of carbon remaining after the retention period (0 to 1).

remainingCarbonPeriodInYears.description: Time period in years over which carbon retention is measured.

origin.description: High-level category of the application medium.

diffuseSinkAuthorized.description: Whether diffuse (non-localized) sink application is permitted for this matrix.

conditions.description: Textual description of conditions for this matrix type.

Location.description: Geographic location with coordinates and optional address.

LcaDatabase.description: A Life Cycle Assessment database used as a source for emission factors.

id.description: Unique identifier of the LCA database.

systemModel.description: The system model used for the LCA calculations.

LcaActivity.description: A Life Cycle Assessment activity representing an emission factor from an LCA database, bound to a specific product and location.

id.description: Unique identifier of the LCA activity.

lcaDatabaseId.description: ID of the LCA database this activity belongs to.

description.description: Detailed description of the LCA activity.

product.description: The product this activity applies to.

unit.description: Unit for the emission factor (interpreted as kgCO₂e per unit).

kgCO2eTotal.description: Total emission factor in kg CO₂e per unit.

externalId.description: Identifier in the external LCA database.

externalLink.description: URL to the activity in the external LCA database.

MachineDpConfig.description: Metadata for a single machine data point configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier of the data point configuration.

name.description: Human-readable name of the data point.

siteId.description: ID of the site this data point belongs to.

machineId.description: ID of the machine this data point belongs to.

frequency.description: Cron expression defining the sampling frequency.

MachineDpRequest.description: Request parameters for fetching time-series data for a single data point.

source.description: The UUID of the machine data point config.

timeBucket.description: Aggregation bucket size. Accepts long-form PostgreSQL intervals (e.g. "5 minutes", "1 hour", "1 day", "1 week") or short-form abbreviations (e.g. "1h", "30m", "1d", "1w", "10s").

MachineDataInRange.description: Time-series data for a single machine data point within the requested range.

TimeSeriesEntry.description: A single data point in a time series. The value is the average of all raw readings within the time bucket.

value.description: Average of all raw readings within this time bucket.
